0x0294.name: Engine Speed.RPM
0x0294.note: Live idle sample read ~840 and the exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0295.name: Manifold Pressure
0x0295.note: Live idle sample read ~20.4 and the exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0296.name: Throttle Position
0x0296.note: Live idle sample read ~10.7 and the exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0443.name: Actual O2 Value Bank 1
0x0443.note: Live sample read 1.000-style value; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0444.name: Actual O2 Value Bank 2
0x0444.note: Live sample read 1.000-style value; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0445.name: Battery Voltage
0x0445.note: Live sample read ~15.0; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0080.name: Target - Idle RPM
0x0080.note: Live sample read 8800 (likely 880.0 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0081.name: Ignition Advance
0x0081.note: Live sample read 200 (likely 20.0 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0085.name: Fuel - Target AFR
0x0085.note: Live sample read 1258 (likely 12.58 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0087.name: Injector Duty Cycle
0x0087.note: Live sample read 652 (likely 6.52 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x008A.name: Boost Control Output
0x008A.note: Live sample read 40 (likely 4.0 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x008C.name: Boost Control Trim
0x008C.note: Live sample read 15 (likely 1.5 scaled); exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0472.name: Coolant Temperature
0x0472.note: Live sample read 30; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0473.name: Oil Temp Sensor 1
0x0473.note: Live sample read 80; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.

0x0474.name: Fuel Temp Sensor 1
0x0474.note: Live sample read 80; exact string exists in the ECU Manager binary.
